channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped table, 27th April
item.description:
Dumped table

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household flytiping outside basswood close, 27th April
item.description:
We found the household flytiping outside basswood house main enterance and pavement please clean it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 27th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leroy Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of dried leaves in Pembury Close, 27th April
item.description:
There is a huge amount of dried leaves in the kerbs and on the bend between 3 and 4 Pembury Close. Please would you arrange for all the leaves to be swept up and removed ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembury Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed SORN car with flat tyres still abandoned on Barnfield Gardens next to Mayplace Lane., 26th April
item.description:
This car has been here for months and it’s untaxed. Flat tyres. Likely one of the cars that someone on Barnfield is dumping/using for their illegal motoring operation. It’s taking up space for genuine residents who need to park near their home. Photos taken 25th April 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Atrocious fly tipping along Mayplace Lane behind Herbert Road, 26th April
item.description:
This is absolutely disgusting and it’s been like this all year. Photos taken 25th April 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Burrage Road / The Oaks corner, 26th April
item.description:
Photos taken 26th April 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 26th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped yet again!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish strewn across pavement from 14 Conduit Road, 26th April
item.description:
The HMO at 14 Conduit Road doesn’t manage its waste properly and is fly tipping on the pavement. Photo taken 26th April 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conduit Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Frederick Place / Burrage Road corner, 26th April
item.description:
Photos taken 26th April 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frederick Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw6 6hy, 26th April
item.description:
Outside Kilburn Bridge the bin us over flowing , dangerous glass smashed pieces everywhere near bin & on pavement outside pub on Brondesbury Villas side opposite Post office , its dangerous Health Safety issues & bin is OVERLY FULL TOO

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Street bin needs emptying

item.title: Large hedge, 26th April
item.description:
The large hedge overhangs the pavement and it is on the corner so you cannot see what is coming around on the pavement. It overhangs so two people have trouble walking side by side and as it’s by Uplands School loads of families regularly walk past it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Church Road, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping large items near bins, 26th April
item.description:
Folks have been dropping more and more items of furniture and recently a full bed over the last weeks. Generally this area is treated like a drop-off point by a lot of residents on this street unfortunately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camilla Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping…. Consistently there, 26th April
item.description:
Seems like an ongoing issue….

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin near the Moon Under Water, 26th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin and dumped rubbish on the corner of Chase Side Avenue/Nunns Road by the Moon Under Water.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nunns Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 26th April
item.description:
Pothole or damaged paving blocks in the road surface at brick paver raised pavement crossing. Been painted over with give way marking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 272, Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Risk of drowning sign missing, 26th April
item.description:
The risk of drowning signs are missing for the posts by the steps down to the river Poole. Please can they be reinstated?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montana Gardens, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation, 26th April
item.description:
The plants on the south side of the road are over hanging causing cars to drive in the middle of the road when driving into the road from the main street at the end. This is especially a problem when the rail replacement buses or larger vehicles come in.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees/bushes overhanging on narrow pavement, 26th April
item.description:
The pavement along Perry Street has overgrown trees/bushes on the horse field side. The pavement is already quite narrow and it is a a busy main road. Large lorries/trucks use it and it is getting quite dangerous walking along that side trying to dodge the overhang.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and flyposting on recycling container, 26th April
item.description:
Green recycling container covered in graffiti tags and a flyposter for a table sale.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bethwin Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
